rationale: The proposed change concerns the residence homestead exemption under Tax Code §11.13(b). Educ. Code §12.1141 governs open-enrollment charter school renewal, denial, and expiration. The two provisions address unrelated subjects with no overlapping operative text.
quote: Sec. 12.1141. RENEWAL OF CHARTER; DENIAL OF RENEWAL; EXPIRATION.
_note: No conflict; rule_text pertains to charter school renewal and is unrelated to homestead exemption amounts.
